- describe the change
- describe any user-facing behavior change

## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm run test:storybook`

## Release Notes

- [ ] no published-package change

## Breaking Changes

- [ ] not a breaking change
- [ ] breaking change with migration docs
- [ ] breaking change with codemod in `codemods/<changeset-slug>/`
